name: Astra Energy, Inc.
summary: Part I Astra Energy Inc.is an emerging company in the clean and renewable electricity and power generation sectors, with a focus on energy production from solar, waste-to-energy conversion and clean burning fuels. The Company strives to advance clean energy initiatives globally, while delivering measurable benefits to communities and value to our investors by investing in new technology and developing renewable and clean energy projects in markets where demand is high and supply is limited.
